MediaItem.title: Media Item
MediaItem.description: Metadata for an uploaded photo or video

id.description: The unique filename ID of the file

url.description: The path/URL to the media asset

ProfileConfig.title: Profile Configuration
ProfileConfig.description: Global settings such as profile banner image URL

profileImage.description: The URL of the profile avatar image

media/{mediaId}.description: Collection of gallery media photos and videos

configs/{configId}.description: App configuration document, e.g. profile banner settings
